activity_1_b.text:
Listen and repeat.

கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

content.sentence_text: Adjusting the 'g'overnor needs the most careful working style to keep the engine speed stable.
Fitting the 'g'udgeon pin correctly requires the most accurate work during piston assembly.
Using a 'g'rinding wheel safely demands the most responsible behaviour in the workshop.
Testing the i'g'nition involves the most basic technical skill in the system.

example.text:
Listen to the model dialogues.
ආදර්ශ සංවාදවලට සවන් දෙන්න.
மாதிரி உரையாடல்களை கேளுங்கள்.

activity_2_a.text:
Match the words to their definitions.
පදයන් ඔවුන්ගේ අර්ථයන්ට ගැලපෙන්න.
சொற்களை அவற்றின் வரையறைகளுடன் பொருத்துங்கள்.

activity_2_e.text:
Listen and speak the missing line during the pause and check your answer.
සංවාදයට සවන් දෙන්න, විරාමයක් පවතින විට අඩුව පවතින වාක්‍යය පවසන්න, ඉන්පසු ඔබේ පිළිතුර පරීක්ෂා කර බලන්න.
ஒலிப்பதிவைக் கவனிக்கவும், இடைவேளையின் போது விடுபட்ட வசனத்தைச் சொல்லவும், பின்னர் உங்கள் பதிலைச் சரிபார்க்கவும்.

example_dialogues.text_a: This workbench feels sturdier than other workbenches; it must be quite durable.
example_dialogues.text_b: Yes, it is. In fact, it is the most durable workbench here, and it can handle very heavy loads.
example_dialogues.text_b_speaking: ________________________________, and it can handle very heavy loads.

example_dialogues.text_a: This training module looks harder than the others; it must be quite intensive.
example_dialogues.text_b: Yes, it is. In fact, it is the most intensive module here, and it prepares trainees for complex practical tasks.
example_dialogues.text_b_speaking: ________________________________, and it prepares trainees for complex practical tasks.

example_dialogues.text_a: This schedule seems harder than last year’s schedule; it must be quite demanding.
example_dialogues.text_b: Yes, it is. In fact, it is the most demanding schedule here, and it requires careful planning.

keywords.word_1: able to last a long time without breaking or wearing out.
needing a lot of effort, skill, or attention.
done very carefully, with attention to every aspect.
taking a long time to complete.
not likely to move, change, or fall over.
using new ideas, designs, or technology.

dialogues.text_a: This grinder’s manual looks more detailed than the last one; it must be quite thorough.
dialogues.text_b: Yes, it is. In fact, it is the most thorough manual here, and it covers every procedure.

dialogues.text_a: This delivery plan seems harder to manage than the one we had before; it must be quite time-consuming.
dialogues.text_b: Yes, it is. In fact, it is the most time-consuming plan here, and it requires careful coordination.

dialogues.text_a: This software interface looks harder to use than the last one; it must be quite complicated.
dialogues.text_b: Yes, it is. In fact, it is the most complicated interface here, and only advanced users access it.
dialogues.text_b_speaking: ________________________________, and only advanced users access it.

dialogues.text_a: This ladder looks stronger than the others; it must be quite stable.
dialogues.text_b: Yes, it is. In fact, it is the most stable ladder here, and we use it for high-level work.
dialogues.text_b_speaking: ________________________________, and we use it for high-level work.

dialogues.text_a: This plotter looks newer than the others; it must be quite modern.
dialogues.text_b: Yes, it is. In fact, it is the most modern plotter here, and we use it for high-volume projects.
dialogues.text_b_speaking: ________________________________, and we use it for high-volume projects.

dialogues.text_a: This pneumatic drill sounds stronger than the others; it must be quite powerful.
dialogues.text_b: Yes, it is. In fact, it is the most powerful drill here, and it can handle tough materials.
dialogues.text_b_speaking: ________________________________, and it can handle tough materials.

activity_a.text:
Match column A to column B. 
 A තීරුව B තීරුවට ගළපන්න. 
 A நெடுவரிசையை B நெடுவரிசையுடன் பொருத்துங்கள்.

සවන් දී වාක්‍ය නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

content.colunm_a: feeling sure about your abilities and decisions
able to change easily when situations or tasks change
someone you can trust to do tasks correctly and on time
willing to work well with others and help the team
having knowledge or skill gained from doing a job many times
eager and willing to work hard and achieve goals

activity_b.text: I am the most organised automobile trainee here today.
We are the most motivated students in this class.
She is the most reliable technician on duty today.
They are the most cooperative team during practical sessions.
He is the most experienced supervisor in this department.
We remain the most adaptable workers under sudden pressure.
I was the most confident speaker in meetings yesterday.
She is the most communicative instructor in our centre.
They are the most responsible staff members for ensuring safety.
I was the most detail-oriented trainee during final inspection.

activity_a.text:
Read the following passage and answer the questions given below. 
පහත දැක්වෙන ඡේදය කියවා ඉන්පසු දී ඇති ප්‍රශ්නවලට පිළිතුරු සපයන්න.
பின்வரும் பத்தியைப் படித்து, அதற்குக் கீழே கொடுக்கப்பட்டுள்ள வினாக்களுக்கு விடையளிக்கவும்.

activity_b.text:
Listen.
கேளுங்கள்.
සවන් දෙන්න.

activity_c.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වාක්‍ය නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

activity_d.text: Read along. පිටපත සමඟ කියවන්න. ஒரே நேரத்தில் வாசியுங்கள்.

sections.heading: Installation
steps: Place the tester on a flat, dry surface near the vehicle.
Check that the cables and clamps are clean and not damaged.
Connect the red clamp to the battery’s positive terminal (+).
Connect the black clamp to the negative terminal (–).
Switch on the power button and wait for the display to light up.
Select the correct vehicle battery type on the menu (12V or 24V).

sections.heading: Safety Tips
steps: Always wear safety gloves and eye protection when working near batteries.
Never connect the clamps to the wrong terminals.
Do not use the tester on a damaged or leaking battery.
Keep the tester away from water, oil, and direct sunlight.
Do not touch metal parts while the engine is running.

sections.heading: Operation
steps: Start the vehicle’s engine.
Wait a few seconds for the voltage reading to stabilize.
Read the alternator output shown on the digital display.
Compare the voltage with the standard range (13.5V – 14.5V).
Use the “Load Test” button to check alternator performance under load.
Press “Save” to record the reading or “Reset” to start a new test.

sections.heading: Maintenance
steps: Turn off and disconnect the tester after each use.
Wipe the surface with a dry or slightly damp cloth.
Keep the clamps and cables clean and dry.
Check the display screen for cracks or loose connections.
Store the tester in its case in a cool, dust-free place.

Questions.question: What should you never do while using the tester?
Questions.answer: Handle metal parts while the engine is running
options: Handle metal parts while the engine is running

Questions.question: Why is it important to match the correct battery type (12V or 24V)?
Questions.answer: It ensures accurate readings and prevents damage
options: It ensures accurate readings and prevents damage

Questions.question: What does the “Load Test” button do?
How should the tester be cleaned?
Questions.answer: With a dry or slightly damp cloth
options: With a dry or slightly damp cloth

Questions.question: When should you disconnect the tester?
Questions.answer: After using it and turning off the engine
options: After using it and turning off the engine

instrction_a.text:
Watch this video to help you better understand today’s lesson.
අද පාඩම හොඳින් අවබෝධ කර ගැනීමට මෙම වීඩියෝව බලන්න.
இன்றைய பாடத்தை நன்றாக புரிந்துகொள்ள இந்த வீடியோவைப் பாருங்கள்.

instruction_b.text:
These steps will help you to learn English from this video.
මෙම වීඩියෝවෙන් ඉංග්‍රීසි ඉගෙන ගැනීමට මෙම පියවර ඔබට උපකාරී වනු ඇත.
இந்த வீடியோவிலிருந்து ஆங்கிலம் கற்க இந்த படிகள் உங்களுக்கு உதவும்.
steps:
